Give your community a unique name. This: Give your community a unique name. This will appear in the <title> tag throughout most of your site.
Enter a brief, concise description of yo: Enter a brief, concise description of your community. Include any keywords or phrases that you want to appear in search engine listings.
Provide some keywords (separated by comm: Provide some keywords (separated by commas) that describe your community. These will be the default keywords that appear in the <meta> tag in your page header. Enter the most relevant keywords you can think of to help your community's search engine rankings.
We recommend using an image with a resol: We recommend using an image with a resolution of 200x40 for the site logo.
We recommend using an image with a resolution of 200x40 for the header logo on mobile.
Enter the name you want the emails from: Enter the name you want the emails from the system to come from in the field below.
Enter the email address you want the ema: Enter the email address you want the emails from the system to come from in the field below.
Emails typically get sent through the we: Emails typically get sent through the web server using the PHP mail() function. Alternatively, you can have emails sent out using SMTP, usually requiring a username and password, and optionally using an external mail server.
In some cases, you might need to include: In some cases, you might need to include ssl:// in the hostname.
Default: 25. Also commonly on port 465 (: Default: 25. Also commonly on port 465 (SMTP over SSL) or port 587.
Utilizing an email queue, you can allow: Utilizing an email queue, you can allow your website to throttle the emails being sent out to prevent overloading the mail server.
The number of emails to send out each ti: The number of emails to send out each time the Background Mailer task is run.
Trends are determined by an algorithm th: Trends are determined by an algorithm that is based on the topics that are popular within the “x days” that you configured here rather than topics that have been popular for a while or on a daily basis, to help your members discover the hottest emerging topics of your platform.
Home feed only loads activities that hav: Home feed only loads activities that have been created since (days)
To optimize the loading speed of the hom: To optimize the loading speed of the home page, the system will only load the activities that have been created since x days that you configured here.
To optimize the notifications system, th: To optimize the notifications system, the system will only show the notifications that have been sent to users x days that you configure here.
Friend invitation by email setting (plea: Friend invitation by email setting (please enter 1-> 100)
Specify the maximum number of emails eac: Specify the maximum number of emails each time a member can send invitations on the 'invite' page. If you enter a value that is not valid, the system will use the default value of 10.
Number of invitations that can be sent p: Number of invitations that can be sent per day (please enter 1-> 1000)
Specify the maximum number of emails tha: Specify the maximum number of emails that a user can send in one day. If you enter a value that is not valid, the system will use the default value of 10.
The base URL for static files (such as J: The base URL for static files (such as JavaScript and CSS files). Used to implement CDN hosting of static files through services such as Cloudfront.
The application connects to your server: The application connects to your server (using AJAX) every few seconds to check if there are any new notifications. How often do you want this process to occur?
Share to friends by email setting (pleas: Share to friends by email setting (please enter 1-> 100)
Specify the maximum number of emails tha: Specify the maximum number of emails that a user can type in to share at the 'Share post by email' page. If you enter a value that is not valid, the system will use the default value of 10.
Share a post - maximum photos can be att: Share a post - maximum photos can be attached
Maximum photos that member can attach to: Maximum photos that member can attach to a post to share (0 or empty setting is unlimited).
Share a post - maximum characters can be: Share a post - maximum characters can be posted
Maximum number of characters allowed whe: Maximum number of characters allowed when creating a post (0 or empty setting is unlimited).
Write a comment\/reply - maximum charact: Write a comment/reply - maximum characters can be written.
Maximum number of characters allowed whe: Maximum number of characters allowed when writing a comment (0 or empty setting is unlimited).
Write a comment\/reply - maximum photos: Write a comment/reply -  maximum photos can be attached.
Maximum photos that member can attach to: Maximum photos that member can attach to a comment (0 or empty setting is unlimited).
Suggested hashtags are determined by an: Suggested hashtags are determined by an algorithm and, by default, are tailored for you based on who you follow, what you recently viewed and your interests. This algorithm identifies topics that your members may be interested in that have been shared within the 'x days' that you configured here rather than topics that have been shared for a while or on a daily basis, to help your members discover the latest topics that they may be interested in inside your platform.
The system will stop sending 'new follow: The system will stop sending 'new follower' notifications to members whenever his/her follower reaches the value that you configured here to optimize the notification system. Your members also have the option to turn on/off this notification on his/her own profile settings page (0 or empty setting is unlimited).
Maintenance mode will prevent site visit: Maintenance mode will prevent site visitors from accessing your website.

If enabled, videos will autoplay by defa: If enabled, videos will autoplay by default. Members can turn it off in Profile -> Settings -> Display
To ban users by their IP address, enter: To ban users by their IP address, enter their address into the field below. Addresses should be separated by commas, like 123.45.67.8, 23.45.67.*
To limit signups by email address, enter: To limit signups by email address, enter the addresses into the field below. Addresses should be separated by commas, like email@domain.com, email2@domain.com, *@domain.com. You may use an asterisk (*) as a wildcard character.
To limit signups by username, enter the: To limit signups by username, enter the username into the field below. Username should be separated by commas, like SiteAdmin, Postmaster.

Allows you to switch sites and apps to i: Allows you to switch sites and apps to invitation only sign up mode. If enabled, to sign up a new account, users need to do via a link sent by an existing user inside the system or invitation code.
Allow you to on\/off 'Select Tags to Fol: Allow you to on/off 'Select Tags to Follow' and 'Select Users to Follow' sign up step.

For how long should the user stay locked: For how long should the user stay locked out?
If this is enabled, the password must be: If this is enabled, the password must be at least 6 characters in length and must contain at least one upper case letter, one number, and one special character.
Minimum age. If the 'Date of birth' fiel: Minimum age. If the 'Date of birth' field is not required or value of this setting is empty, age restriction will consider as disabled.
The option will apply for both web and m: The option will apply for both web and mobile apps. If enabled, this field will show in sign up but will show on in edit profile page as option field. If age restriction is enabled, please enable this option.
This option will apply for both web and: This option will apply for both web and mobile apps. If enabled, this field will show in sign up process and edit profile page as required field. If disabled, the field will not show in sign up but will show on edit profile page as optional field.

This option will apply for both web and mobile apps. If enabled, this field will show in sign up process and edit profile page as required field. If disabled, the field will not show in sign up but will show in edit profile page as optional field.
Two-factor authentication (2FA) provides: Two-factor authentication (2FA) provides an additional layer of security beyond passwords and is strongly recommended. Your member's account is protected by requiring both your password and an authentication code from authenticated email.
This system will compress, convert, and: This system will compress, convert, and optimize videos to mp4. This system requires \"ffmpeg\" to be installed on your server.

Ewallet is a tool that allows users on y: Ewallet is a tool that allows users on your site to deposit money, withdraw money and use money in their wallets to perform online transactions on this platform. The e-wallet's currency is set by you and you can set the conversion rate to fiat currency. This section allows you to set up information related to the system's Ewallet.
Specify the size limit that applies to e: Specify the size limit that applies to each file separately to restrict the allowed uploaded file size. If you leave it empty, the size will be limited by PHP's maximum post and file upload size (current limit is :size). If you change the value here, make sure you change the PHP's maximum post and file upload size as well.
Allows you to broadcast your server-side: Allows you to broadcast your server-side Laravel events to your client-side JavaScript application using a driver-based approach to WebSockets. See more details
